name: Tucoemas
description_short: Tucoemas Federal Credit Union is a California-based credit union with $337M in assets, 25,038 members, and 6 branches offering checking, savings, loans, and financial services since 1948.
description_long: Tucoemas Federal Credit Union was established in 1948 and is headquartered in Visalia, California. As a federally-chartered credit union, it operates under the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA) and maintains FHLB membership. The institution has grown to serve approximately 25,038 members across 6 branch locations with total assets of $337.46 million as of September 2025. The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of banking and financial services including checking and savings accounts, ATM/debit card programs, real estate loans, personal loans, and various deposit products. Their loan portfolio totals $155.25 million, with significant holdings in unsecured loans ($25.2M), real estate loans ($20.3M), and other loans ($109.7M). They provide specialized programs including first-time homebuyer financing, international remittances, and low-cost wire transfers. The organization maintains 78 full and part-time employees under CEO Brice Yocum and Chairperson Jason LeFaive. Tucoemas operates as a community credit union serving urban and rural areas without a low-income designation. Their financial position shows $298.1 million in total shares and deposits, $67.4 million in cash equivalents, and positive net income of $1.09 million for the reporting period. The credit union's loan income of $10.2 million represents their primary revenue source, supplemented by investment and other income streams. As a mid-sized regional credit union, Tucoemas serves the Central Valley community with established banking infrastructure and member-focused services. Their 78-year operational history demonstrates stability, though members should note their membership is limited to designated community groups and not open to all individuals. The institution's financial metrics indicate solid operational performance with appropriate loan loss provisions.
pros: Established 78-year history since 1948 with strong community presence in Central Valley California
Substantial asset base of $337.46 million providing financial stability and service capacity
6 branch locations for convenient member access across the region
Specialized programs including first-time homebuyer assistance and international remittances
FHLB member status enabling competitive lending rates and funding sources
Diverse loan portfolio with $155.25 million in total loans across multiple categories
Positive net income of $1.09 million demonstrates profitability and sustainability
cons: Community credit union membership restrictions limit eligibility—not open to all individuals regardless of location
Relatively modest equity position of $27.43 million provides limited capital buffer compared to asset size
Negative reserve balance of -$6.26 million indicates accumulated losses in reserve accounts
Limited geographic footprint with only 6 branches restricts accessibility for non-local members
Smaller institution compared to major banks may offer fewer digital banking or specialized services
best_for: Central Valley California residents who meet community credit union membership eligibility requirements
First-time homebuyers seeking community-based mortgage origination and support services
Individuals needing international money transfer services in the Tulare, Fresno, and Kings County areas
Members seeking personal loans, checking/savings accounts, and ATM/debit card services from a locally-rooted institution
diagnosis: Tucoemas Federal Credit Union is best for Central Valley California residents who qualify for community credit union membership and seek stable, community-oriented banking services. Primary caveat: membership eligibility is restricted to designated community groups and geographic areas—not all individuals qualify for membership regardless of location.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Tucoemas Federal Credit Union is a California credit union with $337M in assets offering checking, savings, loans, and financial services since 1948.
